---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- **OS version:** (e.g., macOS 15.2)
- **Thyself version:** (e.g., v0.1.0, or commit hash if building from source)
- **Node.js version:** (run `node --version`)
- **Rust version:** (run `rustc --version`)

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

For app crashes, check `~/Library/Logs/Thyself/` for log files.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help diagnose the issue.

> **Privacy reminder:** Do not include any personal data (messages, session content, database contents) in bug reports. Use anonymized or synthetic examples.
